name: aios
description: AIOS — local AI operating system for your home computer

scripts.dev: AIOS_APPS_PORT=9503 node server/main/index.js --port=9502 & AIOS_MAIN_PORT=9502 node server/apps/index.js --port=9503 & vite --config gui/vite.config.js gui
scripts.start: sh -c 'AIOS_APPS_PORT=9503 node server/main/index.js --port=9502 & main=$!; AIOS_MAIN_PORT=9502 node server/apps/index.js --port=9503 & apps=$!; trap "kill $main $apps 2>/dev/null" INT TERM EXIT; wait'
